name: Nuncle Stones
description: Standing stones at the edge of the woods near Lankshorn. A place where local children gather. The stones appear to mark a point where the boundary between the mortal realm and Fairy is thin.
notes: Lucien was playing music here when small creatures appeared from thin air and swept him away to the Blossom Fields.
Sadie Maldwort witnessed the event and described short creatures appearing from thin air, speaking to the elf, then vanishing with him.
A small handmade pin shaped like a vial was found near the stones — it belonged to Sadie Maldwort.
Her father Sidewich Maldwort discouraged her from playing here.
